---
title: "NotebookLM — Data Profile (consolidado, multi-conta)"
subtitle: "Catalogo descritivo dos 8 parquets do parser v3 (account-1 + account-2)"
jupyter: python3
---

```{python}
#| label: setup
#| code-summary: "Setup — paths, conexao DuckDB, helpers"

import sys
from pathlib import Path

_this = Path.cwd()
_project_root = _this if (_this / "src").exists() else _this.parent
sys.path.insert(0, str(_project_root))

import json
import pandas as pd
import duckdb
import plotly.graph_objects as go
from itables import init_notebook_mode, show

init_notebook_mode(all_interactive=False)

PROCESSED = _project_root / "data" / "processed" / "NotebookLM"
con = duckdb.connect()

for table in ("conversations", "messages", "tool_events", "branches",
              "sources", "notes", "outputs", "guide_questions"):
    p = PROCESSED / f"notebooklm_{table}.parquet"
    if p.exists():
        con.execute(f"CREATE VIEW {table} AS SELECT * FROM read_parquet('{p}')")

# NotebookLM palette: laranja Google
ACC1_COLOR = "#F4B400"   # Google Yellow/Orange (account-1, en)
ACC2_COLOR = "#DB8B00"   # Darker orange (account-2, pt-BR)
SOURCE_COLOR = "#F4B400"
SECONDARY = "#DB8B00"
ACCENT = "#EA8600"
MUTED = "#FBE9B7"


def fmt_pct(n, total):
    pct = n / total * 100 if total else 0
    return f"{n:,}/{total:,} ({pct:.0f}%)"


def show_df(df, **kwargs):
    from IPython.display import display
    display(df.style.hide(axis="index"))


def stacked_bars_by_account(df, x_col, y_col, title, height=350):
    """Stacked bars: x_col x y_col, agrupado por account ('1' azul, '2' laranja)."""
    fig = go.Figure()
    for acc, color, name in [("1", ACC1_COLOR, "account-1 (en)"),
                              ("2", ACC2_COLOR, "account-2 (pt-BR)")]:
        sub = df[df["account"] == acc]
        if len(sub) > 0:
            fig.add_trace(go.Bar(
                x=sub[x_col].tolist(), y=sub[y_col].tolist(),
                name=name, marker_color=color,
            ))
    fig.update_layout(
        barmode="stack", title=title, height=height, template="plotly_white",
        margin=dict(t=50, b=40, l=40, r=20),
    )
    return fig
```

# Visao geral

```{python}
#| label: overview

totals = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM conversations) AS conversations,
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM messages) AS messages,
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tool_events) AS tool_events,
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM branches) AS branches,
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sources) AS sources,
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notes) AS notes,
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM outputs) AS outputs,
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM guide_questions) AS guide_questions
""").df()

show_df(pd.DataFrame([
    {"Tabela": "conversations.parquet", "Rows": f"{totals['conversations'].iloc[0]:,}"},
    {"Tabela": "messages.parquet", "Rows": f"{totals['messages'].iloc[0]:,}"},
    {"Tabela": "tool_events.parquet", "Rows": f"{totals['tool_events'].iloc[0]:,}"},
    {"Tabela": "branches.parquet", "Rows": f"{totals['branches'].iloc[0]:,}"},
    {"Tabela": "sources.parquet", "Rows": f"{totals['sources'].iloc[0]:,}"},
    {"Tabela": "notes.parquet", "Rows": f"{totals['notes'].iloc[0]:,}"},
    {"Tabela": "outputs.parquet", "Rows": f"{totals['outputs'].iloc[0]:,}"},
    {"Tabela": "guide_questions.parquet", "Rows": f"{totals['guide_questions'].iloc[0]:,}"},
]))
```

> **Sobre este documento.** Catalogo descritivo dos 8 parquets do NotebookLM
> agregando ambas as contas (1=en, 2=pt-BR). Para vista de uma conta so,
> ver `notebooklm-acc-1.qmd` ou `notebooklm-acc-2.qmd`.
>
> NotebookLM nao eh chat puro — cada notebook gera ate 9 tipos de outputs
> distintos (audio, blog, video, flashcards, quiz, data table, slide deck,
> infographic, mind map). Schema canonico (Conversation/Message/ToolEvent/
> Branch) eh complementado por 4 tabelas auxiliares (sources, notes,
> outputs, guide_questions) pra capturar essa especificidade.
>
> `guide.summary` vira system message (sequence=0) em todo notebook —
> garante `message_count >= 1` mesmo quando chat=None.

## Distribuicao por conta

```{python}
#| label: by-account

by_acc = con.execute("""
    SELECT account,
        COUNT(*) AS notebooks,
        SUM(message_count) AS messages,
        AVG(message_count) AS avg_msg
    FROM conversations
    GROUP BY account
    ORDER BY account
""").df()

show_df(by_acc.assign(avg_msg=by_acc["avg_msg"].fillna(0).round(1)))
```

# 1. Cobertura

## 1.1 Notebooks com chat real

```{python}
#| label: chat-coverage

cov = con.execute("""
    SELECT account,
        COUNT(DISTINCT conversation_id) AS total_convs,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN role IN ('user','assistant') THEN conversation_id END) AS with_chat,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN role='system' THEN conversation_id END) AS with_summary
    FROM messages
    GROUP BY account
    ORDER BY account
""").df()

show_df(cov)
```

## 1.2 Outputs por tipo (stacked per-account)

```{python}
#| label: output-coverage

types_df = con.execute("""
    SELECT account, output_type_name, COUNT(*) AS count
    FROM outputs
    GROUP BY account, output_type_name
    ORDER BY output_type_name, account
""").df()

if len(types_df):
    fig = stacked_bars_by_account(
        types_df, "output_type_name", "count",
        "Outputs por tipo (stacked: account-1 + account-2)",
    )
    fig.show()

# Tabela com totais
totals_per_type = con.execute("""
    SELECT output_type, output_type_name, COUNT(*) AS total,
        SUM(CASE WHEN account='1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS acc1,
        SUM(CASE WHEN account='2' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS acc2
    FROM outputs
    GROUP BY output_type, output_type_name
    ORDER BY output_type
""").df()
show_df(totals_per_type)
```

## 1.3 Sources stats

```{python}
#| label: sources-stats

src_stats = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        COUNT(*) AS total_sources,
        SUM(content_size) AS total_chars,
        AVG(content_size) AS avg_chars
    FROM sources
""").df()

show_df(src_stats.assign(
    total_chars=src_stats["total_chars"].fillna(0).astype(int),
    avg_chars=src_stats["avg_chars"].fillna(0).astype(int),
))
```

# 2. Outputs (9 tipos)

## 2.1 Conteudo por tipo

```{python}
#| label: outputs-content

content_stats = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        output_type_name,
        COUNT(*) AS count,
        COUNT(content) AS with_content,
        AVG(LENGTH(content)) AS avg_chars,
        SUM(LENGTH(content)) AS total_chars
    FROM outputs
    GROUP BY output_type_name
    ORDER BY count DESC
""").df()

show_df(content_stats.assign(
    avg_chars=content_stats["avg_chars"].fillna(0).astype(int),
    total_chars=content_stats["total_chars"].fillna(0).astype(int),
))
```

# 3. Notes stats

```{python}
#| label: notes-stats

n_stats = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        account,
        kind,
        COUNT(*) AS count,
        AVG(LENGTH(content)) AS avg_chars
    FROM notes
    GROUP BY account, kind
    ORDER BY account, count DESC
""").df()

if len(n_stats):
    show_df(n_stats.assign(
        avg_chars=n_stats["avg_chars"].fillna(0).astype(int),
    ))
else:
    print("Nenhuma note.")
```

# 4. Preservation

```{python}
#| label: preservation

pres = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        account,
        is_preserved_missing,
        COUNT(*) AS count
    FROM conversations
    GROUP BY account, is_preserved_missing
    ORDER BY account, is_preserved_missing
""").df()

show_df(pres)
```

---

**Render:** `QUARTO_PYTHON="$(pwd)/.venv/bin/python" quarto render notebooks/notebooklm.qmd`
